findings.area: agenda row — i morgen, 21:00 England – Argentina
findings.issue: Fixture shows a flag emoji next to 'Argentina' but no flag next to 'England', so only one side of the matchup is badged. Same asymmetry visible at 375/393px. Names are still fully legible; this is a recurring cosmetic asymmetry (also flagged in the 2026-07-12 review) rather than a new regression — likely because no single Unicode flag emoji exists for England (only the UK flag, which would be misleading).

notes: No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; single quiet column holds at all three widths.

Event and fixture names read in full, nothing truncated: 'Tour de France 2026', 'Round 2 – XXVI Obert Internacional Sant Martí 2026', 'VM-semifinale 1', 'EFG Swiss Open Gstaad', 'England – Argentina', 'The Open', 'Corales Puntacana Championship', 'London Athletics Meet – Karsten Warholm (400m hekk)', 'VM-bronsefinale', 'Moët & Chandon Belgian Grand Prix', 'VM-finalen 2026', 'BLAST Bounty S2 – 100 Thieves (online-stadiet)'.

Norwegian-channel contract holds: only TV 2 Play, TV 2, Viaplay, HBO Max (Sport), NRK1/NRK TV, NRK 1, BLAST.tv (gratis offisiell strøm) appear as 'where to watch' — no ESPN/FOX/Sky at any width. 'HBO Max (Sport)' matches the known Max Sport channel bundle available in Norway (same family as the 'Max +1' channel accepted in the prior review), not a foreign broadcaster.
One row (Round 2 – XXVI Obert Internacional Sant Martí 2026, chess) exercises the honest empty '–' channel placeholder — renders quietly, easy to distinguish from a missing/broken value.
Round labels (Semifinale, Bronsefinale, Finale) show correctly next to knockout fixtures at all widths.
National flag emoji and sport icons render cleanly — no broken image icons or empty boxes.

Must-see accent (left border + tinted wash) appears on about 8 of 12 events today/this week (golf, athletics, cup finals) — a heavy density, but consistent with the prior review's conclusion that this tracks tracked favorites/Norwegian interest rather than being a blanket design regression (today has several followed golfers plus cup finals in play).

Header, 'Dine neste' tracked list, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger'/'✎ Rediger' links, and footer (Oppdatert / Abonner i kalender / last ned / Aktivitet / AI-budsjett: uke 63% · økt 65%) intact and aligned at every width.
Could not assess clearly: the small chevron icon next to the clock in the header (top right) — unclear what it represents, not clipped or broken (same as prior review).
